channel.title: Shubham Vij - Blog
channel.description: Articles on software engineering, AI, machine learning, and research.

item.title: Graph Foundation Models: An Interactive Study Guide
item.description: A brilliant.org-style interactive course on Graph Foundation Models — message passing, the heterogeneity trilemma, the GFM zoo, and the billion-scale frontier. Seven modules with hands-on labs, quizzes, and 40+ referenced papers.
